hero.subtitle: Shah Alam's premier swimming academy for toddlers, adults, and special needs.

info.about_desc1: At LumbaLoomba Swimming Academy, we believe that swimming is an essential life skill that should be accessible to everyone.
info.about_desc2: Our certified coaches specialize in water confidence, stroke correction, and specialized therapy in a safe, controlled environment.
info.prog_kids_desc: Water survival and basic strokes in a fun environment.
info.prog_adults_desc: Overcome fear and build stamina at your own pace.
info.prog_special_desc: Tailored 1-on-1 sessions focusing on motor skills.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent fee structures designed for every swimmer's journey. Choose the plan that fits your goals.
pricing.plan_kids_desc: Perfect for building early water confidence and basic strokes.
pricing.plan_adults_desc: Overcome fear and master swimming at your own pace.
pricing.plan_special_desc: 1-on-1 personalized attention for rapid progress or special needs.
pricing.note: * One-time registration fee of RM 50 applies for all new enrollments. Family discounts available.

reviews.title: What Our Swimmers Say
reviews.subtitle: Real stories from our LumbaLoomba community.

social.title: Join Our Community
social.subtitle: Follow us on social media for the latest updates, tips, and swimmer highlights.

contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help you start your swimming journey.

register.subtitle: Secure your spot today. Fill out the form below and our team will contact you to confirm your schedule.

footer.desc: Empowering swimmers of all ages to conquer the water with confidence, skill, and safety. Dive into excellence with us.
footer.picad: Template designed by PICAD and not endorsed by LumbaLoomba.
